name: pyqt6-graphs-qt6

metadata.name: PyQt6-Graphs-Qt6
metadata.summary: Couldn't find suitable artifact for pyqt6-graphs-qt6==6.8.1

documentation:
This package contains the subset of a Qt installation that is required by
PyQt6-Graphs.  It would normally be installed automatically by pip when
you install PyQt6-Graphs.

This package is licensed under the terms of the GPL v3.
